| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| deity = {{ill|Gozu Tennō|lt=Gozu Tennō|de|Gozu-Tennō|en|Gozu Tennō|it|Gozu Tennō|ja|牛頭天王|zh|牛頭天王|qid=Q11570247|1=Gozu Tennō}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Imakiawosakainaminoikekamino Shrine'''|今城青八坂稲実池上神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|Q11588442|ltq=Q11588442|qid=Q11588442|1=Gion shrines}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11546334|ltq=Q11546334|qid=Q11546334|1=List of Shikinaisha in Musashi Province}}
** Series ordinal: 37
** P155: {{ill|Imakiawosakanoinamiaramitamano Shrine|lt=Imakiawosakanoinamiaramitamano Shrine|qid=Q135039747|1=Imakiawosakanoinamiaramitamano Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q2963366|ltq=Q2963366|qid=Q2963366|1=Chichibu Shrine}}
